task_completion.description: Navigate to the Jenkins System Configuration page
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Jenkins 'Configure System' or 'System' settings page is visible in the browser.

task_completion.description: Configure the system to support HTML markup
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the System Configuration page, the 'Markup Formatter' dropdown is set to 'Safe HTML' (which corresponds to hudson.markup.RawHtmlMarkupFormatter).

task_completion.description: Update the System Message with the provided HTML content
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'System Message' text area contains the exact HTML string provided in the task description, including the div with inline styles, h3 heading, and unordered list.
The agent clicks the 'Save' button at the bottom of the System Configuration page, returning to the Jenkins dashboard.

task_completion.description: Verify the formatted HTML banner is displayed on the Jenkins dashboard
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Jenkins dashboard displays the announcement banner at the top. It must be rendered as formatted HTML (yellowish background, bold text, bullet points) and NOT as raw HTML text tags.

integrity.description: Verify the agent interacted with the genuine Jenkins web interface
integrity.visual_evidence: The screenshots show the actual Jenkins UI (with Jenkins logo, sidebar, and standard layout) rather than a local HTML file or a text editor.

integrity.description: Verify the agent did not use browser developer tools to fake the banner
integrity.visual_evidence: The browser's Developer Tools (Inspect Element) panel is not open in the screenshots showing the final banner.

integrity.description: Verify the agent actually configured the settings rather than just navigating to the dashboard
integrity.visual_evidence: There should be screenshots showing the agent actively interacting with the 'System Message' textarea and 'Markup Formatter' dropdown in the configuration page.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The required markup formatter to support HTML is 'hudson.markup.RawHtmlMarkupFormatter', which is labeled as 'Safe HTML' in the Jenkins UI dropdown. The final rendered announcement must contain the heading 'Scheduled Maintenance Notice', the date 'January 25, 2025', the time '02:00 to 06:00 UTC', the email 'devops-team@company.com', and three bulleted list items: 'All running builds will be suspended', 'Pipeline executions will be paused', and 'Please plan your deployments accordingly'.
